title: Prologue
content: Before the events of this story took place, there was a small girl who lived by the sea.

title: Chapter 1
content: Twenty years later, the girl had become a woman, and she had returned home.

title: Chapter 2
content: The house was just as she remembered it. Smaller, perhaps. Quieter, certainly.

title: Epilogue
content: Many years passed after that summer. The cottage stood empty for a time. Eventually, others came.
